name: USS Cross (DE 448)
events: 17 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) conducted A/S exercises (depth charge technique) off Bermuda with USS Trippe (T/Cdr. C.R. Kear, Jr., USN), USS Chevalier (T/Cdr. F. Wolsieffer, USN) and USS Cross (Lt. H.L. Minshall, Jr., USNR).
27 Feb 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) departed Bermuda for Guantanamo Bay. She is escorted by USS Cross (Lt. H.L. Minshall, Jr., USNR).
2 Mar 1945 Giovanni da Procida (T.V.(Lt.) F. Castracane Degli Antelminelli) and USS Cross (Lt. H.L. Minshall, Jr., USNR) arrived at Guantanamo Bay from Bermuda.
